US policy remains unchanged, but Beijing was cautioned against using force.

SBI Mutual Fund acquired the entire stake at Rs 2,435.6 per share. This transaction occurred as Adani Enterprises' stock experienced a sharp rally, climbing as much as 9% during the trading session.
